key.name: paste-on-selection
key.description: Click an entry to also send Ctrl-V to the focused window. When false, only the clipboard is set.

key.name: move-item-first
key.description: Click an entry to also call ringboard move-to-front, so the entry becomes the most recent on the server.

key.name: confirm-clear
key.description: Show a confirmation dialog before wiping the entire history.

key.name: private-mode
key.description: Pause clipboard intake. New copies are not submitted to the server.

key.name: process-primary-selection
key.description: Also intake text from the PRIMARY (text-highlight) selection. Off by default.

key.name: strip-text
key.description: Trim leading and trailing whitespace before submitting to the server.

key.name: enable-typeahead-search
key.description: Letters typed while the dropdown is open jump into the search box.

key.name: toggle-menu
key.description: Keyboard accelerator to open or close the clipboard history dropdown.
